## The problem

<!-- What are you unable to do today? Concrete situation, not a solution. -->

## What you would like instead

<!-- If it changes a documented claim or a number, say which one. -->

## How it would be verified

<!--
This project's rule: a claim is Measured, Verified, Observed or Reasoned, and
labelled as such. What command or citation would demonstrate this works?
"not measured" is an acceptable answer for parts of it.
See CONTRIBUTING.md -> "The house rule on claims".
-->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Including "do nothing and document the limitation", which is often correct. -->

## Scope check

- [ ] This does not require vendoring or redistributing CLIProxyAPI.
- [ ] This does not add a network dependency to `tools/` (standard library only there).
- [ ] This does not exist to help someone put pooled personal OAuth accounts behind a public
      endpoint (see [`docs/OPERATING_A_PUBLIC_SERVICE.md`](../../docs/OPERATING_A_PUBLIC_SERVICE.md)).
